name: phonenumbers (Google libphonenumber for Python)
pricing_notes: Open source (Apache-2.0); David Drysdale / Google libphonenumber port

performance.notes: Pure Python; fast for individual number parsing; large data files

agent_readiness.notes: Parse, validate, format phone numbers worldwide. import phonenumbers. phone = phonenumbers.parse('+14155552671'). phonenumbers.is_valid_number(phone). phonenumbers.format_number(phone, phonenumbers.PhoneNumberFormat.INTERNATIONAL). phonenumbers.format_number(phone, phonenumbers.PhoneNumberFormat.E164). phonenumbers.region_code_for_number(phone). phonenumbers.number_type(phone). geocoder.description_for_number(phone, 'en'). carrier.name_for_number(phone, 'en'). phonenumbers.parse('415 555-2671', 'US'). Example DB: +1-800 FLOWERS → parsed.

gotchas: Must provide default region for numbers without country code (+)
Large metadata files add ~8MB to package size
geocoder/carrier databases may be slightly outdated
best_when: Validating user-entered phone numbers in web forms
Formatting phone numbers in E.164 format for SMS/voice APIs
Determining country and carrier from phone number
Parsing free-text phone numbers with region hints
avoid_when: When only US numbers are needed (simpler regex suffices)
Real-time carrier lookup (carrier data is embedded, not real-time)
When Twilio/Vonage Lookup API real-time data is needed
summary: phonenumbers provides Google libphonenumber for Python. phonenumbers.parse('+14155552671'). is_valid_number(). format_number(phone, E164). region_code_for_number(). geocoder.description_for_number(). carrier.name_for_number(). Apache-2.0 by David Drysdale. Worldwide phone number parsing and validation. Provide region hint for numbers without +. Large metadata adds ~8MB. Best for form validation and E.164 formatting.
